action_items.rationale: Without a random baseline, steering success rates are uninterpretable. If random directions achieve comparable success, the steering results are artifacts of adding any direction to the residual stream.

action_items.description: Weaken abstract and conclusion claims to match evidence strength
action_items.rationale: The current framing ('may not be a critical failure mode') is stronger than the underpowered data support. Replace with 'we find no detectable relationship given power constraints.'
Document minimum detectable effect sizes at 80% power for n=26. Show that observed correlations fall below detection threshold.
'Moreover' (Section 2.3), 'Furthermore' (Section 2.4), and 'It is worth noting that' (Section 5.2) are banned filler transitions flagged by the writing review.

action_items.description: Add full-activation probing data or remove the claim
action_items.rationale: Section 5.3 claims full-activation probing outperforms k-sparse but provides no numbers. Either add data or remove the claim.

action_items.description: Add explicit discussion of steering robustness to encoder absorption
action_items.rationale: Steering bypasses the encoder, making it inherently robust to the type of absorption Chanin measures. This confound should be explicitly discussed, not treated as surprising evidence.

action_items.description: Report exact Chanin differential correlation threshold
action_items.rationale: The threshold value is required for reproduction but is not reported in the paper.

action_items.description: Add pilot-vs-full comparison table or footnote
action_items.rationale: Pilot numbers (r=-0.153, p=0.456) appear only in Section 6.3 text, not in any table.

action_items.description: Add SAEBench ablation-based absorption metric validation on subset
action_items.rationale: The null result may be specific to the differential correlation definition. Testing an alternative metric would strengthen or weaken the conclusion.

action_items.description: Add sensitivity analysis: correlation at all k values
action_items.rationale: Only k=5 is used for primary analysis. Showing consistency (or differences) across k values strengthens the null finding or reveals interesting patterns.

action_items.description: Fix awkward sentences and passive voice overuse
action_items.rationale: Section 4.2 'sample the mid-to-late network', Section 4.3 confusing conditioning logic, Section 6.1 ambiguous 'preserves latent activation patterns', and passive voice overuse in abstract/Section 1.2.

action_items.description: Include layer 0 and 10 absorption data for H3 testing
action_items.rationale: H3 is tested with only 2 layers (4 and 8). Including all 4 layers would increase n from 2 to 4 for slope comparison, making the CV computation more meaningful.

action_items.description: Add code repository link and prompt vocabulary
action_items.rationale: The paper promises code release but provides no repository link. The prompt vocabulary is not documented.
